## Checklist

<!-- Make sure all boxes are checked before requesting a review. -->

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented on complex or non-obvious logic
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, API docs, etc.) if needed
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new console warnings or errors
- [ ] I have not committed any `.env` files, secrets, or credentials
- [ ] Any new dependencies are justified and added to `package.json`
- [ ] This PR is scoped to a single concern (not mixing unrelated changes)
